projects.title: A Question-Answering Processing Method, Apparatus, Electronic Device, Storage Medium and Product
projects.intro: This project introduces a medical pathology knowledge retrieval framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). It enhances query understanding through a medical knowledge graph and retrieves relevant content via similarity-based indexing. The LLM then summarizes the results and generates interactive dialogues, enabling intelligent and reliable medical knowledge retrieval and analysis.
